feed.title: Site Title
feed.subtitle: Research Blog of Seungjae Han. PhD student at EE, KAIST. Fascinated with neuroengineering (Analyzing calcium imaging data, Deep learning based data enhancement, etc.)

entry.title: BEAR: Fast and Scalable Robust PCA

link.title: BEAR: Fast and Scalable Robust PCA

entry.summary: BEAR is a fast and scalable Robust PCA method. BEAR solves surrogated version of conventional RPCA. BEAR is SVD-Free and GPU-acceleration-available. BEAR can also combined with downstream neural network to train end-to-end manner.
